faqs.question: How long does business name registration take?
faqs.answer: Business Name Registration is typically delivered same day or within a maximum of 2 working days.

faqs.question: How long does company registration take?
faqs.answer: Limited Company registration takes between 2 to 5 working days.

faqs.question: How long does NGO registration take?
faqs.answer: NGO, Church, and Association registration takes approximately 6 to 8 weeks.

faqs.question: Can I register from outside Lagos?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We operate nationwide across Nigeria. Everything is done 100% remotely.

faqs.question: How do I receive my certificate?
faqs.answer: Certificates are delivered digitally as softcopies directly to you via WhatsApp or email.

faqs.question: How does the payment work?
faqs.answer: We use a 3-stage payment model. You pay 20% to begin, 60% after your name is reserved, and the final 20% only when your certificate is ready.

faqs.question: Is my information safe?
faqs.answer: Completely. All information is handled professionally and confidentially. We are fully CAC-compliant.
